sourceReference.description: Approved Nieves Labs brand-board extractions supplied by Tomas Nieves on 2026-07-11.

prohibitedModifications: Do not regenerate the logo with AI.
Do not vectorize, trace, or reconstruct the monogram.
Do not recreate the logo using CSS, SVG paths, text, or icon fonts.
Do not stretch, rotate, crop, recolor, or alter proportions.
Do not substitute alternate NL marks.
Do not use deprecated reconstructed logo candidates.
repositoryRule: The Nieves Labs logo is an immutable brand asset. It must always be imported from the canonical approved PNG files in public/brand/master and must never be recreated by code, AI generation, SVG reconstruction, tracing, or CSS.
derivedAssetRule: All favicon, Open Graph, social, presentation, email, and app icon derivatives must be generated from the canonical approved PNG assets.
